creator: freebsd@kumba.dev
text:
Someone else appears to have also stumbled into this back in 2019:
https://www.mail-archive.com/freebsd-net@freebsd.org/msg60448.html

But outside of the 2011 tweet and that mailing list post, there is not a whole lot of information on this issue.  It seems to be a rare thing for someone to attempt to use dummynet(4) inside of a jail doing routing to defeat bufferbloat.
